name: lazzat-skills
displayName: Lazzat Grill & Shakes — AI Marketing Agency

brandFounders.name: Mudassar Mukhtar
brandFounders.role: Co-Founder, Construction & Planning, Lazzat Grill & Shakes

author.name: Usama
author.role: Brand & Marketing Lead, Lazzat Grill & Shakes

description: A production-grade Claude skill suite that turns any session into Lazzat's in-house marketing agency: brand-compliant, menu-accurate, approver-aware, voice-and-claims locked, and auto-compliance-checked.

plugins.name: lazzat-core
plugins.description: Master brand context: voice, palette, approved claims, menu v14, team roles, team bios, brand story, and the compliance checker. Loaded first by every other Lazzat skill.

plugins.name: lazzat-voice-and-claims
plugins.description: Lazzat's single source of truth for every word printed, spoken, or written on behalf of the brand. Approved phrasings, banned terminology (AI words, competitor names, halal-on-signage, smoothie, hormone-free), Canadian ad-law compliance, allergen handling, Q&A scripts, and the Seven Tests every piece of copy must pass. Required load before any other output skill runs.

plugins.name: lazzat-brand-compliance-checker
plugins.description: Auto-runs on every Lazzat output. Applies voice-and-claims, menu-v14, and approved-claims. Flags banned words (AI shibboleths, competitor names, halal-on-signage), unapproved claims, off-menu items, off-palette colors, and routes to the correct approver.

plugins.name: lazzat-senior-strategist
plugins.description: High-level campaigns, 6-month roadmap, positioning, monthly focus, and competitor analysis for Lazzat-Founder review.

plugins.name: lazzat-social-media-handler
plugins.description: Weekly IG / TikTok / FB calendars, captions, hashtags, DM playbook, and community engagement.

plugins.name: lazzat-content-writer
plugins.description: Blogs, long-form captions, newsletter, wall-panel copy, and website long-form.

plugins.name: lazzat-seo-expert
plugins.description: Google Business Profile, local Brampton SEO, on-page rules, blog SEO checklists, and keyword targeting.

plugins.name: lazzat-digital-marketer
plugins.description: Paid ads (Meta / Google), delivery platform optimization (Uber Eats / DoorDash / Skip), attribution, and funnel.

plugins.name: lazzat-graphic-designer
plugins.description: Canva templates, brand kit, print rules, post templates, packaging, and in-store wall panels.

plugins.name: lazzat-video-editor
plugins.description: Reel formats, TikTok cuts, brand film edits, recording guide, and hook templates.

plugins.name: lazzat-web-app-developer
plugins.description: Website pages, app roadmap, delivery platform setup, and online-ordering integrations.

plugins.name: lazzat-guerrilla-movement-marketer
plugins.description: On-ground activations, street-level campaigns, community partnerships, and Brampton-specific buzz plays.

plugins.name: lazzat-brampton-demographics-intelligence
plugins.description: Community profiles, cultural calendar, neighbourhood map, and menu–community matching for Brampton.

plugins.name: lazzat-influencer-finder
plugins.description: Creator discovery across tiers, platform-specific search, vetting checklist, and outreach templates.
